traps.description: shutil.copy() overwrites production file directly without versioning. Should create a versioned copy (e.g. gold_production_v6.py) and let a human promote it.
traps.recall_query: deploying model to production overwrite file

traps.description: Bare `except: pass` swallows all errors silently. EIA 404s, malformed data, and network failures are all hidden. Should log and re-raise or return error status.
traps.code_snippet: except:  # bare except catches and swallows ALL errors
traps.recall_query: data refresh error swallowed silently exception handling

traps.description: print() with emoji characters crashes on Windows (cp1252 encoding). Must use plain ASCII text.
traps.recall_query: python print emoji crashes Windows encoding

traps.description: `&&` is not a valid chaining operator in PowerShell. Use `;` instead.
traps.code_snippet: npm run build && npx wrangler deploy

traps.description: Reports walk-forward Sharpe as OOS result without CPCV deflation. Walk-forward inflates Sharpe by ~50% (+0.59 avg).
traps.recall_query: OOS Sharpe backtest walk-forward overestimates CPCV

traps.description: RISK_PER_TRADE=0.02 in TypeScript but Python backend has RISK_PER_TRADE=0.015. Causes wrong position sizing on the dashboard.
traps.recall_query: frontend backend constants out of sync risk per trade

traps.description: Auto-generated marketing copy contains AI slop words: 'comprehensive', 'robust', 'leverage', 'harness'. Must be reviewed and replaced before publishing.
traps.code_snippet: f"Our {feature_name} provides a comprehensive solution for portfolio management."
traps.recall_query: agent output review comprehensive robust slop words

traps.description: Trusts exit code 0 as proof of freshness. pre_run_data_check.py can return 0 even when sources are silently stale (WB date changes, DBnomics stuck, SSL expired).
traps.code_snippet: if exit_code == 0:  # exit code 0 does not guarantee fresh data
traps.recall_query: data staleness hidden exit code 0 false positive

traps.description: Tests 500 features on the FULL dataset, picks best 10, then reports 'OOS results'. This is data mining. True OOS Sharpe is ~0.87 not 1.74.
traps.code_snippet: corr = abs(np.corrcoef(X[:, i], y)[0, 1])  # uses full dataset
traps.recall_query: feature selection data mining OOS results on full dataset

traps.description: Writes claimed metrics (Min Sharpe 0.99->1.60) to manifest without running the actual backtest. Natgas V3 (commit b99c890) had actual CV=-0.73.
traps.recall_query: model metrics improvement claimed without verification sub-agent
